title: bonnaya cordifolia
intro: Bonnaya cordifolia, also known as 'Heart-Leaved Bonnaya' or 'Heart-Leaved Spilanthes', is a perennial herb belonging to the family Acanthaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Bonnaya cordifolia include treating fever, cough, and digestive issues, as well as providing relief from respiratory problems and skin infections. Bonnaya cordifolia can be prepared as a decoction, infusion, or paste, and is often used in Ayurvedic and Unani medicine to treat various health conditions.
